summary: Testing of Season Management, Printable Breeding Cards, Year-over-Year Comparison, and Multi-language support completed successfully. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested

seed_data_creation: Created test season 2090 for UI testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested and working: 1) Seasons API with CRUD, activate, and get active season endpoints, 2) Year-over-Year Comparison API with year selectors and stats comparison, 3) Print Cards API returning breeding card data, 4) Multi-language support (PT, EN, ES) working correctly across all pages.

ui_elements: Card shows: pair name, cage label, band numbers, STAM, year, eggs count, hatched count, zone name
Total Clutches, Total Eggs, Hatched Chicks rows
Fertility Rate, Hatch Rate, Birds Born rows
Change column with color coding (green for positive, red for negative)

navigation_items: Breeding Seasons/Temporadas de Criação/Temporadas de Cría
Breeding Cards/Cartões de Criação/Tarjetas de Cría

observations.seasons_ui: Clean interface with season cards showing year, name, date range, and notes. Active season highlighted with yellow border. Quick add buttons disabled for years that already exist (shown with checkmark).
observations.print_cards_ui: Shows breeding cards with male/female bird info in color-coded sections (teal for male, pink for female). Each card displays band number, STAM, year, paired date, eggs and hatched counts.
observations.year_comparison_ui: Integrated into Reports page below Clutch Summary. Shows two year selectors with 'vs' between them. Comparison table displays metrics with color-coded change column.
observations.language_switching: Instant language switching via top-right popover menu. All page content, navigation, card labels, and button text properly translated.
